news.t: J.P. Morgan Asset Management Launches JPMorgan U.S. Research Enhanced Large Cap ETF on NYSE

holdings.infoBox: JUSA is an equity ETF with a total of 246 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.13%, Apple at 6.69%, Microsoft at 4.91%, Amazon.com at 3.99%, and Alphabet at 3.32%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan U.S. Research Enhanced Large Cap ETF (JUSA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of US large-cap companies. It selects constituents using a fundamental, bottom-up approach and modestly overweights the undervalued securities. JUSA was launched on Mar 13, 2025 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

data.title: J.P. Morgan Asset Management Launches JPMorgan U.S. Research Enhanced Large Cap ETF on NYSE
